recommendations.title: In Search of Darkness
recommendations.overview: An exploration of '80s horror movies through the perspective of the actors, directors, producers and SFX craftspeople who made them, and their impact on contemporary cinema.

recommendations.title: Deadly Prey
recommendations.overview: A group of sadistic mercenaries led by Col. John Hogan kidnap Michael Danton from his home, and set him loose on the grounds of their secret camp to be used as training for new recruits. Danton has been called the "most perfect killer ever." Now, he'

recommendations.title: The Armstrong Lie
recommendations.overview: In 2009, Alex Gibney was hired to make a film about Lance Armstrong's comeback to cycling. The project was shelved when the doping scandal erupted, and re-opened after Armstrong's confession. The Armstrong Lie picks up in 2013 and presents a riveting

recommendations.title: God's Not Dead: We The People
recommendations.overview: Reverend Dave has to defend himself and a group of Christian homeschooling families after an inspection by local government officials.

recommendations.title: Hustle
recommendations.overview: After discovering a once-in-a-lifetime player with a rocky past abroad, a down on his luck basketball scout takes it upon himself to bring the phenom to the States without his team's approval. Against the odds, they have one final shot to prove they

recommendations.title: Where the Buffalo Roam
recommendations.overview: Semi-biographical film based on the experiences of gonzo journalist Hunter S. Thompson.

recommendations.title: Apollo 11
recommendations.overview: A look at the Apollo 11 mission to land on the moon led by commander Neil Armstrong and pilot Buzz Aldrin.

recommendations.title: The Program
recommendations.overview: An Irish sports journalist becomes convinced that Lance Armstrong's performances during the Tour de France victories are fueled by banned substances. With this conviction, he starts hunting for evidence that will expose Armstrong.

recommendations.title: American Ninja 4: The Annihilation
recommendations.overview: The two American Ninjas, Joe Armstrong and Sean Davidson, team up to do battle against a terrorist and his band of Ninjas.

recommendations.title: God's Not Dead: A Light in Darkness
recommendations.overview: Pastor Dave responds to the unimaginable tragedy of having his church, located on the grounds of the local university, burned down.
